name: fetch_yahoo_raw_data
description: Fetches raw league, team, roster, or matchup data from the Yahoo Fantasy API. Requires credentials in .env.

endpoint_type.description: The type of data to fetch.

params.description: Optional dictionary of parameters for the API call (e.g., {'count': 10}).

name: search_external_intel
description: Searches Reddit r/fantasybball for news and discussions regarding a specific player.

player_name.description: The full name of the basketball player (e.g., 'Stephen Curry').

name: get_waiver_pool_stats
description: Fetches top waiver wire / free agent players currently available in the league.
